summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF ECONOMIC COLLAPSE: Brandon describes receiving heavy, sobering visions while praying over his city, revealing a severe upcoming economic crisis reminiscent of the Great Depression but significantly magnified. Brandon explains that the middle class will be entirely eradicated, leaving only the extremely poor and the wealthy. He recounts seeing sprawling tent cities, massive waves of foreclosures on homes and vehicles, and rampant poverty on a scale never before seen in America. Furthermore, Brandon warns of a rising Robin Hood mentality characterized by violent hatred towards the rich, resulting in wealthy neighborhoods requiring constant armed security to prevent looting. The societal breakdown will lead to unsafe streets, mass migrations to rural areas, and apocalyptic pillaging of grocery stores and farms, alongside the bankruptcy of major sports teams due to a lack of fan financial support.

GEOPOLITICAL UPHEAVAL AND ONE WORLD CURRENCY: Brandon foresees irreversible national debt and hyperinflation, predicting that the government will artificially print money in a desperate attempt to save a sinking financial system. He warns that these financial maneuvers will ultimately pave the way for a one-world digital currency aligned with the Mark of the Beast. Additionally, Brandon discusses significant upcoming global events, particularly highlighting a late-September timeline involving the United Nations and discussions of a two-state solution dividing Jerusalem. He also mentions potential deceptions involving alien disclosures, high-stakes peace agreements involving figures like Donald Trump and Zelensky, and the grim reality of thousands of trafficked Ukrainian children tied to global pedophilia rings that are about to face severe divine retribution.

CATASTROPHIC NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon shares alarming predictions regarding extreme weather and natural disasters driven by an acceleration of spiritual seedtime and harvest. He specifically prophesies a devastating, weather-manipulated hurricane striking a major Florida city with an unprecedented storm surge that will dwarf previous disasters. Brandon attributes this specific judgment to the city's overflow of witchcraft and sex trafficking. Furthermore, he describes a future volcanic eruption in Italy of historic proportions, shooting ash so high into the atmosphere that it will severely disrupt global air travel.

SPIRITUAL CORRUPTION AND CHURCH COMPROMISE: Brandon delivers a harsh critique of the modern American church, comparing it to an apple that appears lush on the outside but is utterly rotten at its core. He exposes the entitlement, lack of urgency, and hidden sins among church leadership, noting that many pastors are merely going through the motions with no true anointing. Brandon sharply rebukes believers for their worldly compromises, including social drinking, consuming inappropriate internet content, and wearing immodest clothing, insisting that God is demanding a strict standard of holiness. He emphasizes that a great shaking is coming to awaken the complacent bride and that God will forcefully remove unrepentant, compromising leaders from their pulpits worldwide.

CALL TO REPENTANCE AND DIVINE PROTECTION: Brandon urgently pleads with his listeners to abandon their worldly ways, repent of their hidden sins, and return completely to Jesus before the impending crises strike. He recounts a powerful personal testimony of God's healing fire flowing through his hands to cure his wife's severe back pain, using it as proof of God's present glory and desire to restore His people. Furthermore, Brandon instructs parents to actively exercise spiritual authority by pleading the blood of Jesus and praying Psalm 91 over their children to protect them from schoolyard bullies, illnesses, and violence, assuring them that believers who prepare their hearts and households will experience God's abundant provision and safety during the coming global turbulence.
rawData: [August 19, 2025]-[A financial outpouring - short lived - then a major crash - I see both]-[https://youtu.be/gt4gZKcM2ok]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. I have my sweetheart with me again. I have a very sobering word, is what I want to call it, for what the Lord has given me today. It's very heavy; it's correction for the body. But whenever you get a word like this, and you see into the future, and you see hearts, there was so much the Lord showed me driving around when I was praying over our city today. Quite frankly, I don't even know where to start or how to even bring this up because of how correction was said and what the Lord said. So, I'm asking the Holy Spirit for help right now. I want to deliver it accurately, and I want to deliver it with none of Brandon, all of Jesus. Okay, so this is what I saw. I saw a great economic crisis coming. I haven't seen this in a while: an economic 1930s-style crash on steroids. All I've seen was this blessing, but the Lord brought the blessing in with the crash again. And as I was driving around, I could see—the Lord said, 'What you see is poor now. There will be no middle class in the days ahead. There will be no middle class. There will be poor, and there'll be extreme poor, and then there will be rich.' He said, 'What you see right now—as you see what you consider the people who work at McDonald's, Taco Bell employees, maybe making a little bit above minimum wage, would be considered the middle class in the days ahead. And what we consider poor will be so poor that I saw what I can only describe as poverty like I've never seen before in America.' As I was driving around, I was having an open-eyed vision, and I was actually seeing the way it was in future time, in real-time, driving around. And I can tell you, I've never done this before. I could see tent cities of homeless people walking around. Like when you go to LA and you see a homeless street like Skid Row, this was everywhere. And I can tell you, I saw the housing crisis coming again with people not being able to pay their mortgages—not just a couple hundred people, I'm talking thousands upon thousands of people not being able to pay their mortgages or their car loans. And there was foreclosure everywhere, to the point where I was wondering who was not foreclosing on their houses. Like I said, there was no middle class. There was poor, there was extreme poor, and then there was the rich. But there was a Robin Hood mentality that I saw. There was such a hatred towards the rich. And what I saw in rich neighborhoods was that they had security, armed security, around their houses and around their property at all times because the people would loot them and steal from them. And there were certain streets that we were driving down that I knew, that the Lord showed me in the future, it would not be safe for women to go on those streets. To the point where right now there are malls there, there are nice restaurants there, and the Lord showed me that there would be times in the future that you could not be a woman and go down these streets at night at all. As I drove around, he said to me, 'Woe, America, I have favored you above all other nations with prosperity. I have held you in my hand. I have held you in my hand.' It was the way that the blessing was on America—the favor and the blessing that has been on our nation. And I saw, as I was driving around, a shaking of finances beyond anything I've ever seen before. But he talked to me about the wave of blessing, this window of opportunity, and how he said, 'Brandon, even I, even my wife, we've got to come up even higher in the fire to listen to what he's asking and instructing us to do.' I saw people fleeing the city again, and masses going to rural land and having places of getaway because of how bad it was. I saw people pillaging grocery stores, pillaging farmers' fields and tractors. I'm talking it looked like something out of a Mad Max movie, the way the people were acting. And like I said, I've never seen poverty like I saw in these visions as I was driving around praying over our city. This is Oklahoma; I can't even imagine what it looked like up north. But the Lord said, 'You took part of the word that I said to you about there being glory events instead of sporting events, and you just kind of bypassed it. You didn't think into what I was telling you, that the people would not have finances to go to a sporting event in the days ahead, and that these major sporting teams would have to file bankruptcy because they were not able to pay their big sports teams their salaries. The major contracts that were signed concerning some of these major players, they won't be able to afford them because the teams will not have support from the fans.' So, I saw again the Lord speaking to me about major teams, sporting event teams, that will file bankruptcy because of what's coming in the near future. We have a window of opportunity the Lord is giving us to listen to him for the wealth transfer. What qualifies you for the wealth transfer? And the Lord gave you specific instructions about sowing and what cost you something versus bucket plunkers where you just give a couple hundred bucks and you think, 'Well, I qualified for the wealth transfer,' and the Lord said, 'That's not what qualifies. The one percent will walk in this.' And I saw again today the heart of the church as a whole. I'm not going to say it's each individual person. I'm saying as a whole. Okay? It's fair; this is fair. I saw an apple that looked gorgeous on the outside. And this apple was just juicy looking. But the Lord said, 'I want to take you to the core of what this fruit really is and the fruit of the church as a whole in America.' And it was rotten at the core; it was rotten on the inside. Everything that was displayed on the inside looked like rotten sludge; it was black and putrid and nasty, and it was just so disgusting. But the further it went on the outside, and the display of what it tried to display itself, was beautiful and lush. But when you took a bite out of it, it wasn't the first bite that was bad. It was after you bit it several times and then you got to the center. And the closer you got to the center of the core of the church, it was rotten. And the Lord said, 'I want you to see what I see. I want you to see what comes before me as you ask for revival, but yet I'm trying to bring healing at a certain church, but you're too concerned about timeframes. It's not convenient. And what I'm about to do in this end-time outpouring will not be convenient to you—the 30-minute services, maybe the hour services. Well, you know, we had service two days ago, but you know, we prayed for the revival and a couple of people got saved. And yet we are interceding and we're wanting so much, but yet we want to give so little.' And the Lord showed me there's so much in the hearts of the leaders. I saw people that were something in the past trying to be Sauls, asking to present themselves as if the anointing and the glory was still there. But the Lord said, 'It's a great Ichabod coming. There's a great Ichabod coming on a lot of these people, and they don't even know the glory has departed. The glory has departed. Their heart is far from me.' What you're about to see is this scripture come to full manifestation, and the church has never seen this before. And so I want you to read this scripture, baby. It says, 'And because iniquity shall abound, the love of many shall wax cold.' And that's Matthew. 'But he that shall endure until the end, the same shall be saved.' And this gospel of the kingdom shall be preached in all the world for a witness unto all nations, and then the end shall come. So we're at that place right now. What He started talking to us about is that the love of many will wax cold, and He said you're going to see pillaging and you're going to see people in the body of Christ do things that you never thought you would see, with a turning on people. I saw it. When He used that scripture, I saw the way it was with people, and the way they were not safe to go to Walmart. It was rough. The visions that I had today were rough. And I'm telling you, it shook me because He was talking about all these people who say they're all in, who are in upper leadership. They've been there, and they have this sense of, 'I've been there, I've done that, I have had the glory on me in the past.' And they want to pretend that they're still on the vine, but the heart of who they really are has waxed cold, and they are no longer that vessel that is on fire for Him. They have an entitlement: 'I've been there, I've done that, I'm qualified.' But I saw a church through the Father's eyes that was no longer desperate and hungry anymore; they were entitled. 'You have an hour to do this healing room service, two hours at the most, but if it goes over that, it's time for my bedtime.' But people are so desperate for a touch, and you're a leader, and yet you qualify yourself by a clock, saying, 'Well, it's too long.' And the Lord said, 'Brandon, what's about to happen will not be convenient. A shaking to awaken is coming to America. You're about to see something that you never thought you would see.' And I'm telling you, from sea to shining sea, we will have a great revival. But there is no urgency in the church. The Lord is showing me that. I'm not saying everybody—I don't want to lump everybody in the same category because there are some of you who are very urgent, very hungry, desperate for a move of God. But as a whole, from what He was showing me, He is about to shake you out of your comfort zone. And He told me, He said, 'A lot of the people that you see, Brandon, are going to go home. I'm going to show them the door. They're not going to be behind the pulpit anymore. I'm done. And what you thought you got away with in the past through hidden sin...' He said there is an exposing of things beyond anything. I saw so many leaders, and He gave me an open-eye vision, and I was going over it, and it was wild. I was scanning in the spirit realm, and I was looking at each individual face, and He was showing me the depth inside of them and what He was requiring of them. And He said, 'Brandon, there's so much hidden sin and so much compromise that they feel they've gotten away with for so long, and those days are done. Those days are done of walking in compromise and feeling that you're getting away with something because I didn't do anything about it for so long and you got away. You're preaching from the pulpit and you have this open window inside of you that is letting the barnyard animals in,' is what I want to say, with sin and compromise, and you just say, 'Well, it's been okay because I've been doing this for years.' Those days are over. And as we go into September, as we go into the fall, there's an acceleration of things beyond anybody's comprehension of what I've seen, and it quite frankly shook me. It made me question my walk with Him and say, 'God, search me and know me. Make me pure before You, Father, by Your blood.' I run to You, Father. As David said, 'As a deer panteth after the water, so my soul longeth for You.' I don't want to play church anymore. And I'm telling you, I even saw a major hurricane coming, and He warned me about a major hurricane. And of this major hurricane, He said, 'This hurricane that's about to hit will be so violent on a major city in Florida. I saw a storm surge that was the largest ever recorded coming into a major city.' He said, 'This will make Katrina look like a walk in the park for what I've seen coming.' He said, 'The cup of sin is full before Me concerning the city and sex trafficking.' And He said, 'These cities and the people, there's so much witchcraft. There's so much stuff going on in some of these major cities that the cup of sin is full, Brandon, and seedtime and harvest is accelerating. And you're about to see a harvest for what they've been sowing.' And I saw a storm surge come into this major city down in Florida that was so massive and so big. I mean, it looked like something out of a movie. Fish swimming up—I'm talking dolphins swimming in the city, sharks in the city—a major storm surge because this hurricane was so big, genetically altered through weather warfare, hurricanes like how we just saw a Category 1 go to a Category 5 in just a couple of hours. Never has that happened before. It went from this to, bam, 160 mph plus winds. Folks, we're in a time like we've never seen before. And He's speaking to me about the hurricanes. He's speaking to me about signs in the heavens and the earth, and a shaking to awaken. And He said, 'Ride the wave, Brandon. Ride the wave that's about to take place. You are about to see a financial outpouring in this time. I saw Jerome Powell. I saw all this stuff incoming with the interest rates. I saw, like I said, them seizing houses in the days ahead because the people are not able to pay. I saw inflation. I saw Trump printing money—I'm talking like turning the printing press on in the days ahead. I saw so much artificial money coming because they realized that the Titanic was sinking and there's nothing they can do to stop it. But they're going to tell you everything's better, everything's good, 'We're going to make America great again.' But there is no really making America great again, folks. Regardless of what they tell you, I've seen it. The Lord said to me, He said, 'Brandon, America's debt and where we are is at the point of no return. Regardless of the tariffs they try to—they say, "We're going to raise tariff prices over here" or "do all this over here, we're going to fix this"—I saw there was no fixing it. They will bring in and usher in a one-world currency in the days ahead with a digital dollar, with a digital everything that will line up with the beast system. We're headed for the mark of the beast. Do you understand? We're headed for the end of the end. It's not about making America great again or making America all this again. We're buying—God's giving us more time—buying time. We're staying afloat for you to get your house in order so that you won't be caught off guard if you're listening to Him. Woe unto you who have hidden sin and are not listening to the Father's heartbeat right now and listening to the prophets. He brought them up like they were of Jeremiah. He said, 'There were so many itching-ear prophets, false prophets prophesying, not My heart. But I had Jeremiah Braden saying what I needed him to say. Be My Jeremiah. Warn My people what's coming. Tell My people there's a shaking to awaken. A major revival is coming.' But what is going to cause the major revival? 'I will not be dealing with a house of compromise. I want a purified bride without spot or wrinkle.' But what's going to come is a shaking to awaken His church. And it's the leadership that has been in status quo, thinking everything's okay, 'I can dabble in this and I can dabble in that because I've been doing it for so long and there have not been any consequences for my actions.' And the Lord said, "Those days are done, Brandon." He said, "It's coming to a head. I saw a mountain that was white-capped that was coming to a head." And he said, "The tip of that thing is about to bust through and you're about to see things that you never dreamed you would see or ever thought of." And I go over this and I go over this to warn you of what the Father's heart is. Many people do not know. They're hearing so much itching ears' words. And I refuse to be like the prophets of old and not be like a Jeremiah in these last days warning you that something big is coming—shakings to awaken, earthquakes, tsunamis, fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees. A shaking in the economy beyond anybody's comprehension. But he's given you a window of Trump. Ride the wave. He said to me again today, "Ride the wave, Brandon. Prepare your house. Get ready." He doesn't want his beloved to go through things. But what qualifies you to be his beloved? When he said, "You prophesied in my name. You laid hands on the sick in my name. You cast out devils in my name. Depart from me. I never knew you." He never knew you at all. You were never one of his. Your heart was never there. It was always lip service. You weren't all in. You weren't sold out. It's not about works. I'm not saying it's about works. But it is about heart. There's a difference between working and trying to do something to get the anointing versus my heart is truly for you and I'm desperate for you, versus "I have part of the world and part of it, but I'm going to do lip service because it looks pretty like the apple on the outside and everybody wants to bite the apple, but until they get to the center of who you really are." And I saw so many preachers that had so much pride and so much ego and so much going on on the outside. "We're holy. Oh God, let's worship him for 30 minutes." But their heart of who they were was all about me. And the Lord said, "You asked so many times to go around some of these people." And he goes, "You know whenever my daughter says, 'Daddy, I want to go over here. I want to do this. I want to do that.' And as a father, you say, 'No, I see who those kids really are, and I don't want what's on them getting on you.'" So, you can ask to go around certain people, and you're going, "Man, they're so good on the outside. Boy, they're cool. They're popular. I want to be part of them." And the Lord said to me, "I don't want what's on them on you because you don't know the core of who they really are." I'm protecting you just like you protect your kids and you say, "I see through the spirit who they are and you're not going over to their house. You're not doing this. You're not doing that." I've done that my whole life over my son, over my daughter. You know, that's just the way we are. I don't allow my kids to do certain things because I'm not judging, but it's my job as the father to protect the innocence inside of them because God's given me those children to protect. So, what does the Father say about you? "Hey, I want you to do certain things, this and that." And you go, "Well, I haven't had a door open over there. I haven't had it." Because he's protecting you because he sees something in them that he doesn't want on you—compromise. And he's saying, "I've got to protect that gift inside you because I'm going to use you greatly in the days ahead." And it may feel really lonely. "I feel so abandoned." Sometimes you feel so lonely. Sometimes I say, "Where are my friends?" But when I heard Kathryn Kuhlman say she was a person that was always alone, she said, "My social life is zero." And it helped me because I saw a woman that I respect greatly. We drove over to where she passed away in the hospital today. And when we were driving around in the city, I said, "That's where Sister Kuhlman went home." And I told my kids as we were doing homeschool, I said, "That's where she went home." One of the greatest pioneer women, I would say, of any generation bringing in healing died right there in this hospital. I don't know if she went home alone or whatever, but I just reflect on the elders who walked with him. And she said, "I was alone most of the time. I was sold out to him. There's a place of dying, a refining fire." And I said, "God, help me. I don't want what's in this world." Especially after the open-eyed vision that I had that lasted for over an hour. It shook me because it's so easy to get over into that state of compromise because the world is shiny. It's so easy to get over into that Hollywood stuff where he's not at all. He's that still small voice that draws you close to him daily, that is looking for you and saying, "Will you just sit at my feet?" It may not look glamorous at the time because it's the place of surrender. It's that place of death. It's that place where it doesn't look popular, but that's where he's at. And all I want is him. And in these last days, for what I saw of so many leaders upon our nation, they have no idea of what's truly coming. A lot of them, they're so full of themselves. And the Lord said to me, "Brandon, I'm shaking a lot of these people right out the door." And the people you see in the future will be people with new faces. They won't be people like you see in a lot of this Hollywood stuff. I saw a humbling coming, ladies and gentlemen, that I'm not happy with. It won't just be about America. It will be a worldwide humbling because it's a worldwide revival. And it will be a glorious church rising in Brush Arbor churches, Holy Ghost Woodstocks in the country. Maybe not so much because these big mega churches, they foreclose on them. I saw a lot of them foreclosed. I saw a lot of them that could not pay the mortgage on their building because they were so debt heavy and there was not enough money coming in because the church wasn't able to give like they used to because they were just trying to pay their bills because they weren't listening. How many times have I said it's like Sodom and Gomorrah? Lot was in there and he didn't know what was coming because he became so familiar with Sodom and Gomorrah. Abraham was the only one that knew it was coming. Why? Because he was close to the Father. He was a friend of God. The Bible says that Abraham was a friend of God. And God came and shared his secret things. I refuse to not be a friend of God. There's nothing else that matters to me. I'd give it all away, every dollar. I said, "My God, whatever it takes to be close to your heart in these last days." Last night it was awesome. Diana was getting up off the floor and her back was hurting so bad. She said, "Baby, my back hurts getting off this floor. Will you please pray for me?" And I grabbed a hold of her and the power of God went out of my hands and went all through her body. And she said, "Your hands are getting so hot." And the glory of the Lord filled her up and she felt it all night long. And I don't take any of the... it's not about Brandon, but I want to tell you this. It's amazing to see somebody get so blessed by the glory. And I said, "Thank you, Lord, for touching my babe. I appreciate it. She needed it." And it was refreshing. She said, "Brandon, I felt that anointing all night long." And he was working on the inside of her. He's changing us from glory to glory. He's changing us. I felt it leave my hand. It was so hot. It felt like fire on my hands and both sides of it just, and it was for her front side and her back side because I just went like this. Just the glory filled her. And I'm talking filled her and it was wonderful for her. I'm so glad. But I'm talking about I want more of it. That's the reason I bring it up to you. I want more of it. After what I saw coming, I want more of it. There will be a desperation as men's hearts grow colder that only the fire of God will shake. The great apostasy, the great falling away, the great everything that's about to take place—I'm telling you, we must be prepared spiritually for what's about to take place. He told us he was giving us a window. And as we go into this fall, a great acceleration is coming. In a 24-hour period, everything will change. We got the letter from these people: "Hey Brandon, did you see that September 23rd and 24th of this week is the week of the main event for the UN, and that this is the time they're wanting to split Jerusalem and have a two-state solution?"—talking about all this from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah. Here we are, another acceleration that happens on Rosh Hashanah for a two-state solution vote on the 23rd of September. Whenever he said in September everything will change, wanting to talk about this during the week of the Holy Week, having the blood moon happen for 7 billion people to see on the number seven, which is amazing, 7-11. It's not a coincidence. 7-Eleven, another major event taking place on the 23rd—shakings to awaken these things that the Lord keeps talking to us about. And then people are saying, "Brandon, do you not keep hearing about this Harvard professor talking about this alien thing coming within the next couple of months, by October or whatever?" And folks, I told you we're going to see something that's going to be a great deception. So, am I concerned about what happened today in the White House with Zelensky? Well, we're going to make a peace agreement, we're going to do all this stuff. I pray it happens. I pray it happens. I told you what I saw, what was discussed, and what it would take. Now, did they come to an agreement saying they would give the land up? I don't know what was really said; I haven't had time to listen to all of it. But I'm going to tell you, I saw events trying to take place as Macron and these other leaders—they're not who they say they are. I told you what I saw. What was amazing about the sex trafficking, the sporting events, and all the darkness when it came to children? Even the Prime Minister of Italy said, "Where did all the children go?" Thousands of Ukrainian children have been abducted. And as a mother and grandmother, every single child has to go back to their family. This should be one of our main priorities in these negotiations: to make sure that the children come back to Ukraine, to their families. We need to restore those children back to their families. I say, I know where they are. I was seeing in the spirit yesterday when we were praying, and the Lord was showing me these children are being trafficked. It was darkness. And the Lord talked about the venereal disease again last night—sickening things. And I'm telling you, judgment is coming on these people who are messing with these little kids. And then people say it's boys and girls. From what I saw, it was little boys and little girls—sick pedophilia rings worse than Epstein. And the Lord said, "This is coming to an end. I'm bringing judgment down on these people. Seedtime and harvest is going to accelerate. I'm talking about falling dead right there in the middle of the act." And you're going to hear of celebrities, major sporting celebrities, who will fall dead in the act of messing with these kids in the days ahead. And you're going to be like, "Who died today?" Because, people, the perversion, the cup of sin is full, they are touching the kids, and God is done. Pizzagate—all this weird stuff that's going on with these kids, all this nasty stuff that you hear about—I'm telling you folks, there's a judgment that's going to start to set in because the cup of sin is full. And you will see seedtime and harvest accelerate like we've never seen before. We're stepping over into another frame that we've—I'm telling you, you need to get your heart ready. Signs in the heavens, signs in the earth, signs in politics, signs in finances—He's going to bring revival in a great shaking. I know I say all these things that are really hard to hear, but I have to tell you. I have to tell you, it shook me today. I pray it comes across—the seriousness of what I felt in my heart—through this video, that you hear me, that you repent before it's too late. The Lord spoke to us yesterday. He said, "Many people will start to go to hell and come back and tell you what's been seen on the other side." Do you remember when He said that? He said, "Many people are going to start to go to hell." There've been a lot of encounters of people saying they're going to heaven, but He said, "A lot of people will start to go to hell, and I'm going to give them glimpses of hell, and I'm going to tell them to tell what's going on over there to tell you to get your heart right." So I saw groups of people going and having visions and encounters of hell to warn you. There's going to be a lot of this, and the Lord warned me about it. It's very serious stuff because there's no urgency—there's not enough urgency about the signs of the times and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. There will be an urgency, trust me. So, another thing that I saw was a volcano that erupts with so much force behind it that it goes up into the highest levels it's ever gone to. I don't want to call it outer space, but I'm saying it was so high that some of the ash went to a record-breaking level—the highest ash levels we've known in modern times, or of any kind of record. This ash went clear up, disrupting flights. And this was in the Italy area. I saw shaking coming to Italy that would disrupt flights and air travel in the days ahead. I saw massive explosions of volcanic ash and the power of this thing shooting way up into levels we've never seen before. I don't know, folks. I just tell you what I see, but I have such an urgency to say it, and I pray, like I said, that it comes across in this video—what the Father is saying. And you say, "Well, I don't believe all that. This prophet said this, this, this, that." He that has ears to hear, let him hear. I'm not here to twist your arm to listen to me. I'm here to bring you to prayer. I'm here to tell you it's time to repent. I'm here to tell you Jesus Christ is standing at the door and you must know Him with all your heart. "Unless a man be born again, you cannot enter into the kingdom of God." But I'm talking about being sold out today.
